message:
feat(graphql): subscription reconnect logic + conformance compliance test suite

GraphQL subscription client (subscription.rs, +315/-83 lines):
- Extracted establish_subscription() helper for connection init + ack + subscribe
- ReconnectHandler integration for automatic reconnection on stream errors
- fcp_async_core::select! for concurrent receiver close detection
- send_complete_and_close() cleanup helper for graceful teardown
- reconnect_config_from_ws() derives reconnect policy from WsConfig

GraphQL client tests (client.rs, +231 lines):
- New test suite for subscription and query error scenarios

Conformance compliance tests (compliance.rs, +397 lines):
- ComplianceFinding: pass/fail/skipped construction and status checks
- CheckStatus serialization round-trip validation
- StaticCompliance: empty TOML, garbage TOML, finding check IDs
- DynamicSuite: minimal defaults, handshake construction
- Full coverage of compliance checking primitives

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
